package.name: vehicle_wbt_smartcar_sdk
package.description:
Python SDK for the dev box. Mirrors the official Baidu SmartCar 2026 car_wrap_2026.py MyCar API surface 1:1 — task scripts written for the official code (e.g. car_task_function.py) port to this SDK with near-zero changes. The SDK is a thin ROS2 client; it does NOT touch hardware directly. All operations route through the vehicle_wbt_smartcar_bridge services on the Jetson.
Usage on dev box: from vehicle_wbt_smartcar_sdk import MyCar my_car = MyCar() # connects to ROS_DOMAIN_ID=42 my_car.beep() my_car.move_for([0.1, 0, 0]) my_car.arm.grasp(True) # lane/detection/OCR/NLP: same as official API surface but the # inference backend lives on the dev box (subscribe to # /vehicle_wbt/v1/sensors/camera/*/image_compressed there).
